overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, showing the player character navigating through an industrial canal area, entering a secured underground facility, bribing a guard at a security checkpoint, and moving through narrow residential corridors to reach an exit. The environment transitions from outdoor industrial waterways to dimly lit indoor maintenance tunnels and living spaces.

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of an industrial water canal with large drainage pipes

massive cylindrical industrial pipes emerging from water
murky water channel running through the industrial district
tall modern glass and steel towers visible in the distance
yellow and red warning sign on concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves along an open industrial canal at dusk, with large drainage pipes visible in the water and modern skyscrapers looming in the hazy background. The concrete walkway runs alongside the murky water channel in a deserted industrial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway with security gate

events.description: entering covered industrial structure from outdoor canal area

agents.ego_description: walking through a metal security gate into a covered industrial courtyard

entered.detail: large metal fence gate blocking the entrance
elevated walkway structure spanning above the canal
large white cylindrical pipes running along the wall

segments.scene_description: The player passes through a metal security gate into a semi-covered industrial area, transitioning from open sky to a sheltered concrete corridor. Large white pipes run along the right wall as the path narrows into a tunnel-like structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance tunnel with drainage channel

events.description: slowing approach to metal security door with red warning light

agents.ego_description: moving through dimly lit industrial corridor toward a security checkpoint door

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a narrow industrial tunnel with metal grate flooring and concrete walls, approaching a security door marked with a red light. The environment is dimly lit by sparse artificial lighting, creating a moody underground atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint room with desk and guard

events.description: opening metal door and entering security room
dialogue interaction with NC Resident, selecting bribe option to gain entry

agents.ego_description: approaching the security desk and interacting with the guard to bribe for passage

notable_agents.action: NC Resident standing behind desk demanding payment for entry access

entered.detail: wooden desk with papers and equipment on surface
tall metal storage racks against the wall
chain link fencing dividing the room sections

segments.scene_description: The player enters a small security room and approaches a desk where an NC Resident stands guard. After a brief dialogue interaction and paying a bribe, the player gains permission to proceed through the checkpoint.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential corridor with metal catwalks and graffiti

events.description: entering populated residential area with multiple NPCs standing in corridors

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow residential corridors past standing residents

notable_agents.action: resident in purple jacket and white hat standing near wall

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint and tags
massive vertical utility pipes running floor to ceiling
dirty mattress and bedding materials on the ground

segments.scene_description: Moving through narrow residential corridors with metal grating floors, the player passes several standing NPCs in a makeshift living area. The walls are covered in graffiti and large industrial pipes run along the sides, with mattresses and debris scattered on the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: damaged utility corridor with exposed concrete

events.description: passing through broken wall section with blue neon graffiti

agents.ego_description: approaching the final metal exit doors at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: broken wall section with exposed rebar and rubble
glowing blue and purple spray paint art on damaged wall
double metal doors with push bars and warning signs

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a damaged section of wall featuring glowing blue graffiti, approaching a set of metal exit doors. Large industrial pipes shift to the right side as the corridor narrows toward the final exit point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open industrial canal at dusk into a claustrophobic, underground residential complex. It begins on a concrete walkway beside murky water and drainage pipes, with hazy skyscrapers looming in the distance before passing through a metal security gate into a sheltered concrete corridor. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a dimly lit industrial tunnel with metal grate flooring, leading the camera toward a security checkpoint where a brief interaction with a guard grants passage. The environment then opens into narrow residential corridors filled with graffiti, scattered mattresses, and makeshift living spaces occupied by NPCs. Finally, the camera moves past glowing blue graffiti through a damaged wall section, following the line of industrial pipes toward a set of metal exit doors.
